office_does: The clerk maintains Superior Court records and provides court-user, filing, and passport services.
race_blurb: Incumbent David Lewis offers 41 years in the office and an e-filing record; deputy clerk Brien Kennedy proposes audits, guides, and public office hours.

candidates.summary: A deputy clerk and former private-sector manager running on audits, public visibility, and plain-language service.
highlights: Proposes a public operational audit and plain-language guides [S1]
Would hold monthly public office hours [S1]

spending.basis: Makes a public operational audit and accountability the central administrative proposal.

experience.basis: Combines current deputy-clerk experience with an outsider management and renewal campaign.

candidates.summary: The incumbent clerk, emphasizing continuity, e-filing, customer service, fairness, and access to justice.
highlights: Reports 41 years in the clerk's office [S1]

experience.basis: Incumbent clerk with four decades of direct office experience and an implemented e-filing record.
